source_title: Can Agent Benchmarks Support Their Scores? Evidence-Supported Bounds for Interactive-Agent Evaluation
archive_note: A full GitHub source archive download exceeded 667 MB before the bounded acquisition attempt timed out; the incomplete file was deleted. The recursive API tree is itself truncated. Review inspection is therefore targeted, not a complete release replay.
paper_release_timing_note: The inspected repository commit is dated 2026-05-19T17:02:58Z, eight days after immutable arXiv v1 (2026-05-11); it is not proven manuscript-time byte identity.
inspection_limits: The 6.5 GB evaluation_artifacts tree, complete score ledgers, and all packaged records were not mirrored or replayed. Claims about the implementation are limited to the targeted immutable-commit files above.
